sources_exist.note: Nine of the ten distinct URLs resolved to substantive pages. The IBISWorld URL used inside pi_dist returned an internal error and exposed no source content.

figures_match_sources.note: Master of Code supports a broad 28% fashion-industry creative-design AI figure, Oberlo supports 37% of small-business owners age 55-73, FE supports broad agency multiple ranges, and Moda Moxie demonstrates hourly/project fee construction. The citations do not establish 25% adoption among independent 541490 firms, the CAD adoption timeline, the 60/30/10 billing mix, the design-services buy/exit multiples, zero current consolidators, or the claimed IBISWorld buyer-budget behavior.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: All declared judgment values are bounded and the physical-versus-digital task distinctions are directionally sensible, but the exact six-role wage allocation is not derived from the deterministic role mix or an external 6-digit source. The assumed fashion-dominant revenue mix and top-three subsegment shares are also unsourced. pi_dist's rationale is internally contradictory when it calls relationship stickiness stronger than graphic design while selecting 0.25 versus 0.30, a lower capture value.

rubric_consistent.note: Dataset inputs match the derived dataset exactly, heterogeneous=true follows the catch-all instruction, and MELTING addresses the terminal warning. However, the dominant-subsegment selection and M inputs are unsupported despite the prompt's explicit warning that an M score based on assumed exit demand is unsupported. LOW_CONFIDENCE and the three ESTIMATE inputs are candid disclosures, while ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL is non-disqualifying by itself, but neither resolves the underlying evidence failures.

cross_checks_honest.note: All four cross-check fields are present, but pricing_model_deflation says the fee-compression mechanism is documented by IBISWorld and quotes buyer-budget behavior even though the cited IBISWorld page is inaccessible. Terminal-value justification also asserts precise subsegment revenue shares and a 40-60% McKinsey design-iteration reduction without auditable support in the record.

source_audits.note: The tracker documents extensive fashion, luxury, retail, brand-IP, and product-company transactions. Its brand-heavy contents are consistent with the record's distinction, but a general running timeline is not a systematic search of NAICS 541490 and cannot establish zero PE-backed specialized-design-service platforms doing add-ons in the last 24 months.

FE discusses owner-operated marketing agencies around 3x-4x and broader agency size ranges. It provides no independent fashion/specialized-design transactions, no median for $1-10M EBITDA targets, and no normalization for named-designer portability, so it does not establish the selected 3.5x buy multiple.

The page states that 28% of fashion-industry players integrate AI into creative design processes. It does not contain the separately quoted 35% executive image-creation figure and does not measure independent US design-service firms, so it cannot establish the selected 25% material-adoption input.

FE supports an 8x-12x range for marketing agencies above $5M EBITDA, not the uncited Lincoln fashion-brand 9.1x-9.8x claim or a pure specialized-design platform comp. The page does not establish the selected 6.0x exit multiple.

The Novedge overview discusses the evolution and capabilities of fashion design software but contains no dated 1980s-to-late-1990s majority-adoption evidence and no measured 8-12 or 10-15 year transition.

Oberlo reports 37% of US small-business owners in the broad age-55-to-73 group in 2024. The record labels 25% age 60+ as an ESTIMATE, explicitly identifies its downward fashion-demographic adjustment, and acknowledges there is no 541490-specific source; the page supports the disclosed fallback base.

NCSU reports broad fashion-executive generative-AI adoption and product-development/design use cases. It does not document independent studio client ownership, per-collection/day-rate billing, fee compression, or the selected pi_dist=0.25.

Opening the exact IBISWorld URL returned an internal error with no accessible report content. The record's specific assertion that retailers trimmed buy budgets and delayed designer collaborations therefore could not be verified.

Master of Code supports AI use in fashion creative design and other brand functions. It does not address independent-design-service pricing, relationship portability, scope reduction, or the chosen capture factor.

StyTrix gives specific fashion-design capabilities including garment concepts, textile patterns, colorways, collection variations, and AI-assisted workflow acceleration. This supports the cited direct-substitution capability used in the moat rationale, though not the numerical moat value.

SmartDev describes automated fashion patterns, silhouettes, style variations, faster prototyping, and reduced development costs, including a reported 30% design-to-sample cycle reduction. This supports AI pressure on design workflow, though it does not measure switching costs or key-person portability.

The page explicitly says product styling and development is a leading generative-AI application and reports 28% integration into creative design processes. It supports direct AI competition in digital fashion-design tasks, but not pi_moat=0.18 by itself.

Moda Moxie illustrates a $60 hourly minimum, time estimates for CAD sketches and tech packs, and project markups. It does not support the quoted $50-$200 hourly range, $384 average day rate, $50-$2,000 tech-pack range, per-collection billing, royalties, or the selected 60/30/10 revenue mix.

reasons: At inputs.pi_dist.sources[1] (https://www.ibisworld.com/united-states/market-research-reports/fashion-designers-industry/), the source is inaccessible, yet inputs.pi_dist.rationale and cross_checks.pricing_model_deflation present a specific buyer-budget statement as documented. Re-run with an accessible source that directly supports fee/scope compression or remove the unverified claim and rebuild capture reasoning.

At inputs.historical_analogs.url (https://novedge.com/blogs/design-news/design-software-history-the-evolution-of-design-software-in-transforming-the-fashion-industry-from-cad-to-ai-and-sustainable-practices), the page does not establish the claimed 8-12 or 10-15 year path to majority fashion-CAD adoption. Re-run with dated adoption evidence and show the chain to inputs.t50_years.value.

At inputs.pricing_structure.url (https://www.moda-moxie.com/post/how-to-calculate-your-freelance-rate-for-fashion-designers-free-template), the page does not support the 60% per-collection/project, 30% day/hourly, and 10% royalty mix or most quoted price ranges. Re-run with a survey or transparent multi-source estimate for the dominant billing forms and shares.

At inputs.buy_mult.url and inputs.exit_mult.url (https://www.feinternational.com/blog/agency-marketing-ma-consolidation-ai-exit-opportunities), generic marketing-agency ranges do not establish paid specialized-design-service multiples in the required small-target and $10M+ platform scopes. Re-run with matched comps or an explicit comparable normalization; do not create M from assumed exit demand.

At inputs.active_consolidators.url (https://www.thefashionlaw.com/a-running-timeline-of-fashion-and-luxury-mergers-acquisitions/), a broad fashion/retail deal tracker cannot prove zero active PE-backed 541490 design-services consolidators. Re-run with a systematic current platform/add-on search and documented qualifying criteria.

At inputs.current_adoption_pct.url (https://masterofcode.com/blog/generative-ai-in-fashion), broad brand/industry adoption does not establish 25% material use by independent US specialized-design firms, and the same page does not support the quoted 35% figure. Re-run with a traceable service-firm source or a documented conversion from brand data.

At inputs.ai_replaceable_share.breakdown_by_role and reviewer_note, the exact 6-digit role shares and fashion-dominant/top-three revenue shares are hypotheses without a reproducible crosswalk or revenue evidence. Re-run with an auditable role and subsegment allocation before computing V and the blended terminal assessment.

At inputs.pi_dist.rationale, the text says fashion has marginally stronger relationship stickiness than graphic design while assigning 0.25 versus 0.30, which represents lower capture, and elsewhere says fashion control is weaker. Re-run with one consistent direction and evidence-based mechanism for the declared value.
flags_reviewed: ESTIMATE_HEAVY: 3 inputs with quality ESTIMATE (buy_mult, exit_mult, owners_60plus_pct)
ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on B, M, S
